meta.title: Convert MP4 to MP3 — Free, In Your Browser, No Upload | {{SITE_NAME}}
meta.description: Extract the audio from .mp4 video to an .mp3 file right in your browser. Nothing is uploaded — your file never leaves your device. Free, no sign-up, no watermark.
og.title: Convert MP4 to MP3 — Free, No Upload
og.description: Pull the audio out of an .mp4 into .mp3, locally in your browser.
hero.title: Convert MP4 to MP3 — right in your browser
hero.lead: Drop an .mp4 video and pull out just the audio as an .mp3 — for podcasts, music, lectures or voice notes. It's extracted on your own device, so the file is never uploaded.
prose.p1: Sometimes you only want the sound: a song, an interview, a lecture, a voice memo. Extracting to MP3 drops the video entirely and keeps just the audio in a small file that plays in every music app and on every device.
prose.p2: Most converters upload your video to a server first. {{SITE_NAME}} doesn't — the audio is extracted locally in your browser, so nothing is stored or logged, and even long recordings don't need a slow upload.
faq.a1: No. The extraction happens entirely in your browser, on your own device. There's no server that could receive the file — check your browser's Network tab while it runs and you'll see zero bytes leave.
faq.q2: What MP3 quality do I get?
faq.a2: You can pick the bitrate before converting — from 128 kbps (small) up to 320 kbps (best quality). 192 kbps is a good default for speech and most music.
faq.q3: Can it handle a long video?
faq.a3: Yes. Audio is tiny compared with video, so even hour-long recordings extract quickly and stay small.
